projectDescription: A curated collection of DNS over HTTPS and DNS over TLS configuration profiles (.mobileconfig) for iOS and macOS, along with build scripts to generate and sign them.
keyFeatures: Ready-to-install .mobileconfig profiles for iOS and macOS
Supports both DNS over HTTPS (DoH) and DNS over TLS (DoT)
35+ providers including Cloudflare, Google, Quad9, AdGuard, OpenDNS, and more
On-demand rules to exclude trusted Wi-Fi networks
Build scripts to generate and sign profiles from JSON source definitions
Multilingual documentation (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese)
Interactive CLI tool to create custom profiles
publicApiSurface: npm run build — rebuild all profiles from JSON sources
npm run sign — re-sign all profiles with an ECC SSL certificate
npm run new — interactively create a new custom profile
npm run test — parity check for signing implementations
src/scripts/detach.ts — detach CMS signature from a signed profile
genProfile(name, profile) — generate a .mobileconfig XML string
getProfiles(name, variant) — get all protocol profiles for a variant
getVariants(name, provider) — get all resolved variants for a provider
validateDnsInput(x, where) — validate DNS endpoint configuration
signFile(args) — sign a .mobileconfig file with a certificate
